nasb.text: When he had taken him and brought him to his mother, he sat on her lap until noon, and then died.

esv.text: And when he had lifted him and brought him to his mother, the child sat on her lap till noon, and then he died.

cnv.text: 於是僕人把他抱著，送到他母親那裡。孩子坐在他母親的雙膝上，到中午就死了。

ccb.text: 仆人把他抱起来，送到他母亲那里。孩子坐在母亲的膝上，到中午就死了。
